_doc: CCD ligand blob for FMN. Atoms/bonds plus the six geometry constraint groups Boltz-2 expects on the trunk's small-molecule input tensors (rdkit_bounds_*, chiral_*, stereo_bond_*, planar_bond_index, planar_ring_5_index, planar_ring_6_index). Indices are 0-based within this ligand; the TS featurizer adds the global atom offset when concatenating into the prediction.
